All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbstractPrimaryLog<T,DLE extends DataLogEntry,P extends Publisher>
Base class for all primary loggers.
CompoundLogger
Interface for all CompoundLoggers.
Configurator
Handles configuration of robot logging.
Hook
Track wether the output of a callable has changes.
LightSubsystem
Implmentation of a subsystem similar to SubsystemBase without registering to LiveWindow
LogCTREDrivetrain
 
Loggable
Base interface for objects which configure thier own logging internally
Loggerhead
Singleton that orchestrates all logging.
Loggerhead.SourceUpdateMap<T extends AbstractPrimaryLog<E,?,?>,E>
 
LoggingTableRootDefinedError
Raised when the the root table is instantiated more than one time
LogMode
Specify which of three logging modes an entity can be acting on.
LogNetworkXboxController
A CompoundLogger which logs all inputs from a CommandXboxController
LogPowerDistribution
 
LogSubsystemCommands
CompoundLogger for subsystems tracking things about commands on a subsystem.
OneShot
Untility class to publish values to NetworkTables and write values to logs one time.
PrimaryBooleanLog
 
PrimaryDoubleLog
 
PrimaryIntegerLog
 
PrimaryPoseLog
 
PrimaryStringLog
 
PrimarySwerveStateLog
Implementation of AbstractPrimaryLog for an array of SwerveModuleState structs.
Table
Way of structuring loggers other than manually building paths for loggers.
